title: Internal Error: Assertion triggered in file "[...]/duckdb/src/storage/arena_allocator.cpp" on line 97: head
description:
### What happens?

Running the following query in debug mode triggers an assertion:
```sql
WITH cte AS (
    SELECT 1 AS ext
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 4
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN ext % 2 = 0 THEN 'even'
        ELSE 'odd'
        END AS pred,
    TRUE AS eof,
    CAST(NULL AS BOOLEAN) AS converter,
    STRING_AGG(cte.ext, 'abc') OVER () AS str_agg
FROM cte;
```

Here is the stacktrace I get from gdb:
```

```

### To Reproduce

You can run the query with the following command on the debug build shell to trigger the assertion
```bash
cmake-build-debug/duckdb <<EOF
WITH cte AS (
    SELECT 1 AS ext
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 4
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN ext % 2 = 0 THEN 'even'
        ELSE 'odd'
        END AS pred,
    TRUE AS eof,
    CAST(NULL AS BOOLEAN) AS converter,
    STRING_AGG(cte.ext, 'abc') OVER () AS str_agg
FROM cte;
EOF
```

### OS:

Ubuntu 25.04

### DuckDB Version:

v1.5.0-dev2046 (Development Version) 620e685c6d

### DuckDB Client:

Shell

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

### Affiliation:

TUM

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String, flag Nullable(Bool));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'test', 1), (2, NULL, 0), (3, 'example', NULL), (4, 'sample', 1);
WITH cte AS (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE flag IS NOT NULL) SELECT arrayStringConcat(groupArray(value), ', ') AS aggregated_values FROM cte;
SELECT id, IF(value IS NULL, 'NULL', value) AS value_check FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, arrayStringConcat(groupArray(value), '|') AS concatenated FROM test_table WHERE flag = 1;
key_bug_features: STRING_AGG function with NULL cast in query
